name: Monica De La Cruz
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $431,016 for Monica De La Cruz in U.S. House, TX-15. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
